attacking_style: Attacks 3-4km from summit finishes, preferring sustained efforts over explosive accelerations. Thrives in breakaways on mountain stages where he can hold tempo rather than sprint, vulnerable when caught near the line.
team_tactics: Dual-purpose rider capable of classification hunting while supporting team leader (demonstrated with HAIG at Vuelta 2021). Often deployed in breakaways to either win or control stage, though dropped early when pure domestique role required.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes with sustained gradients where tempo climbing and time trialing ability combine. Climbing ITTs particularly strong. Struggles on steep punchy gradients requiring finishing kick and against pure sprinters on flatter finishes.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing punch when caught near the line by world-class chasers (caught at 25m by ROGLIČ, barely held off BERNAL). Early-race crashes and abandons suggest fragility in demanding three-week races. Cannot sustain multiple counterattacks.
key_patterns: Attacks 3-4km from finish, holds tempo rather than accelerates repeatedly (Giro 2021, Romandie 2022)
Caught within final meters multiple times, lacking sprint power against elite closers (Paris-Nice 2021 twice)
Strong early-season form trajectory, consistently performs well Paris-Nice through Romandie period (2021-2023)
Home race motivation factor, active in Swiss races like Tour de Suisse (2021, 2023)
Young rider classification focus while supporting leaders, dual-purpose excellence (Vuelta 2021 white jersey)
Crash/abandon vulnerability in Grand Tours, fragility under three-week demands (Giro 2021 DNF, Vuelta 2022 dropped)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Paris-Nice fifth place and successful Tour de Suisse break suggest strong early-season form returning after 2022 struggles, though Grand Tour reliability remains unproven
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
